<!DOCTYPE html><html dir="ltr" lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><base href="https://myportalcode.com/"><title></title><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"><meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge"><meta name="description" content=""><meta name="keywords" content=""><link href="https://myportalcode.com/index.php?route=location/home" rel="canonical" /><meta property="og:site_name" content="MYPORTALCODE.COM"><meta property="og:url" content="https://myportalcode.com/"><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:title" content=""><meta name="og:image" content="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/myportalcode/bootstrap/big-icon-new.png"><link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/webp;base64," type="image/x-icon"></head><body><div id="myportalcode-content"></div><script>
fetch("index.php?route=common/home/full_page_info", { headers: { "X-Requested-With": "FetchRequest" }}).then(response => {
return response.text();
}).then(data => {

const app = document.getElementById("myportalcode-content");
app.innerHTML = data;

// Load scripts in the order they are defined
// Note that inserting scripts into an element using innerHTML doesnt work - hence this logic
var scripts = app.querySelectorAll("script");

if (scripts !== null && scripts.length > 0) {
var loadScript = index => {
if (index < scripts.length) {
var newScript = document.createElement("script");

if (scripts[index].innerText) {
var inlineScript = document.createTextNode(scripts[index].innerText);
newScript.appendChild(inlineScript);
}
else {
newScript.src = scripts[index].src;
}
scripts[index].parentNode.removeChild(scripts[index]);
newScript.addEventListener("load", event => loadScript(index + 1));
newScript.addEventListener("error", event => loadScript(index + 1));
app.appendChild(newScript);
}
}

loadScript(0); // Start loading script 0. Function is recursive to load the next script after the current one has finished downloading.
}
}).catch(err => {
console.warn('Something went wrong.', err);
});  




</script><script type="text/javascript">

display: none !important;
}
ins.adsbygoogle[data-ad-status="unfilled"] a {
display: block;
}
</style><style>
#consetbox{font-family: Inter, sans-serif;font-size:13px;}
.hide{display: none;}
#consetbox{width: 100%; position: fixed; bottom: 0px; z-index: 9999;}
.consent-content{width: 60%; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center; background: #120404b0; padding: 15px; border-radius: 7px; color: #fff; font-size: 13px;}
.consent-buttons{display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-top: 10px;}
.consentaccept{padding: 10px; border: 2px solid #fff; border-radius: 10px; margin-right: 10px;cursor: pointer;}
.consentreject{padding: 10px; border: 2px solid #fff; border-radius: 10px; margin-left: 10px;cursor: pointer;}
</style><div id="consetbox" style="display: none;"><div class="consent-content"><p>We use cookies to improve your experience. By clicking "Accept," you agree to our use of cookies.</p><div class="consent-buttons"><span class="consentaccept" id="consent-accept">Accept</span><span class="consentreject" id="consent-reject">Reject</span></div></div></div><script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const consentBox = document.getElementById('consetbox');
const acceptBtn = document.getElementById('consent-accept');
const rejectBtn = document.getElementById('consent-reject');
function setCookie(name, value, days) {
let expires = "";
if (days) {
let date = new Date();
date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
expires = "; expires=" + date.toUTCString();
}
document.cookie = name + "=" + value + "; path=/" + expires;
}
function getCookie(name) {
return document.cookie.split('; ').find(row => row.startsWith(name + "="));
}
function CookiesAccept() {
setCookie('CookieBy', 'MYPORTALCODE', 1);
consentBox.style.display = "none";
}
function CookiesReject() {
setCookie('CookieBy', 'REJECTED', 1);
consentBox.style.display = "none";
}
// Show consent box only if no cookie is found
if (!getCookie('CookieBy')) {
consentBox.style.display = "block";
}
acceptBtn.addEventListener("click", CookiesAccept);
rejectBtn.addEventListener("click", CookiesReject);
});
</script></body></html>
